name: Studio Force II 72

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: B2D53104-D008-4C34-AA04-8207AC44B150

comment: Studio Force II 72 is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situations demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events and theatre lighting.
